testcase.name: Attempt to create a booking with missing/invalid required fields
testcase.system-out: When User enters search criteria with checkin "2025-08-01" and checkout "2025-08-05".passed And User attempts to create a new booking with missing required fields:.....passed Then API response status code should be 400 for bad request.................passed And User gets "size must be between 11 and 21" error message for missing or invalid input fields.passed

testcase.name: Attempt to create a booking with missing/invalid required fields 2
testcase.system-out: When User enters search criteria with checkin "2025-08-01" and checkout "2025-08-05".passed And User attempts to create a new booking with missing required fields:.....passed Then API response status code should be 400 for bad request.................passed And User gets "must be a well-formed email address" error message for missing or invalid input fields.passed
